section.heading: Purchase of seeds and plants for distribution

content.p: Purchase and distribution of vegetable, field, and flower seeds, plants, shrubs, vines, bulbs, and cuttings shall be of the freshest and best obtainable varieties and adapted to general cultivation.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 415 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1896—Act Apr. 25, 1896, struck out “by the Department of Agriculture” and “trees”, and inserted “vegetable, field, and flower seeds” and “bulbs”.
